summary: Tracking issue for reviewing and merging community-contributed PRs (new APIs, performance improvements, code quality) into SkiaSharp v4 before the 4.x RC 1 milestone.

repoLinks.description: Add function to SkiaSharp.HarfBuzz for shaped text paths
Start using Span instead of arrays
SKP Debugger - Blazor WASM with native DebugCanvas

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: Milestone 4.x RC 1 is actively being targeted; review work is underway per comments.

analysis.summary: This is a v4 milestone tracking issue for reviewing 11 community PRs across new APIs, performance improvements, code quality, and tooling. Detailed code reviews have already been posted in comments: #3752 is merge-ready; #2987, #3583, #3632 need minor fixes; #2513, #3203, #2865 need moderate fixes; #3033 needs significant rework; and #3489, #2669, #2617 are recommended for closure.

codeInvestigation.finding: Multiple community PRs target this directory: #2987 adds DrawPoints count overload, #2513 adds shaped text paths in HarfBuzz, #2669/#2617 add Span overloads.
#3203 attempts to enable Vulkan on macOS via skia_use_vulkan=true in GN config, but requires skia_moltenvk_path to be effective.

keySignals.interpretation: This is a child tracking issue in the v4 milestone planning umbrella.

keySignals.text: #3752 — TreatWarningsAsErrors: Clean, correct warning fixes. No behavioral changes.
keySignals.interpretation: At least one PR is ready to merge immediately.

keySignals.text: Critical: crashes on collection mutation during enumeration, use-after-dispose race with timer, coordinate behavior change.
keySignals.interpretation: DrawShapedText caching PR has correctness issues preventing merge.

analysis.rationale: Classified as type/enhancement because this is a project management tracking issue organizing work to improve the v4 codebase by merging community contributions. The area is area/SkiaSharp as it spans the core library. No specific platform or backend is targeted overall. Action is keep-open because the milestone tracking work is still ongoing — not all PRs are checked off yet.
nextQuestions: Which PRs have received author fixes based on review feedback?
Is #3033 (DrawShapedText caching) going to be deferred to 4.1+?

actionability.reason: Active milestone tracking issue with several PRs still needing review feedback responses or further work. Detailed code reviews are posted; maintainer action required to merge or close each PR.
